headline: US 🍔💥 HITS IRAN 🧕 after TANKER 🍆💦 STRAIT DRAMA 🛳️🔥
text: US 🍔💥 launched POWERFUL 💪🔥 strikes on IRAN 🧕🚫 after three OIL TANKERS 🛢️💦 got HIT 🎯 in the STRAIT OF HORMUZ 🛳️🔥🚀. Centcom said they SMACKED 💥 over 80 TARGETS 🎯 including 60+ IRGC 🚢 small boats 🛶 in the strait. IRAN 🧕 deputy foreign minister called it a VIOLATION 🚫📜 of last month’s MEMO 📝 and warned Tehran will TAKE DECISIVE MEASURES 🔪🚨. Strikes landed on Qeshm island 🏝️, Bandar Abbas 🏙️ and Sirik, with locals getting SHRAPNEL 💥🤕. Iran not CLAIMING 🚫🙅 the tanker attacks yet. Centcom also SMASHED 🚀 missile LAUNCH SITES 🏹 and COMMAND CENTERS 🎮. US said the tanker hits were WHOOLY UNACCEPTABLE 🚫🤬 so they gonna IMPOSE HEAVY COSTS 💰💸 on shipping crew 🚢👨‍✈️. Treasury yanked the oil SANCTIONS WAIVER 🚫🛢️ from the MEMO 📝. IRAN 🧕 called the move BAD FAITH 🤥 and said they’ll do WHATEVER NECESSARY 🛡️ to protect NATIONAL INTERESTS 🇮🇷. Qatar 🇶🇦 and Saudi 🇸🇦 both SLAMMED 💥 Iran after their tankers Al-Rekayyat 🛳️ and Wadyan 🛳️ got HIT. UKMTO reported a tanker with ENGINE ROOM FIRE 🔥 after projectile STRIKE 💥. US says they still negotiating in GOOD FAITH 🤝 but IRAN’S NEW REGIME 🆕👑 looks NOTHING like the old one. Iran trying to boss the strait with their PERSIAN GULF STRAIT AUTHORITY 🏛️🛳️ and possible SERVICE FEES 💵 for ships passing. US now says they’ll STAND DOWN 🛑 after the EXCHANGE of STRIKES 💥🤝. Strait drama just turned into a full-on MIDDLE EAST 🔥🔥🔥 oil brawl! 🚀🛢️
